error_signature: Missing bearer or basic authentication in header
title: Authentication error with OpenAI API request
symptom: When making a POST request to the OpenAI API, n8n returns a 401 error indicating missing authentication. The error message states 'Missing bearer or basic authentication in header'.
root_cause: The error occurs because the HTTP request node in n8n is not configured to use the correct authentication method. Instead of manually entering the API key in the headers, using predefined credentials ensures that the authentication is properly handled.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Select 'Predefined Credentials' as the Authentication type
Choose the appropriate OpenAI credentials from the dropdown
Save the workflow and try executing it again
agent_instruction: Change the authentication method in the HTTP Request node to 'Predefined Credentials'.
